messages: Channeling my inner Morgan Drinks Coffee...
Asking the beans how they feel...
Running through the Barista Hustle curriculum...
Measuring TDS for the nth time...
Channeling is bad, unless it's channeling vibes...
Watching one more Weiss Distribution video...
Preheating the group head of knowledge...
Tasting notes: patience, with hints of anticipation...

errors.uploadImage: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG, etc.)
errors.provideInput: Please provide at least a coffee bag photo or taste preferences
errors.generateFailedGeneric: Failed to generate profile. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.generateFailed404Route: Failed to generate profile: The server route was not found (404). This is often a reverse-proxy/API path mismatch — verify your proxy forwards /api/* to MeticAI.
errors.generateFailedTimeout: Failed to generate profile: The AI request timed out. Please retry; if this repeats, reduce prompt complexity or try a stronger Gemini model.
errors.generateFailedValidation: Failed to generate profile: The AI generated an invalid profile schema. Please retry — a second attempt often succeeds.
errors.generateBusy: A profile is already being generated. Your form has been preserved — please try again in a few minutes.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save results. Please try again.

navigation.aiUnavailable: AI profile generation is unavailable. Enable AI features in Settings and ensure a Gemini API key is configured.

profileGeneration.imageFormats: JPG, PNG, or other image formats
profileGeneration.describeFlavor: Describe your ideal espresso flavor profile using text, tags, or both
profileGeneration.validationError: Please provide at least a coffee bag photo or taste preferences
profileGeneration.getStarted: Get started by generating your first profile

shotHistory.title: Shot History
shotHistory.scanningLogs: Scanning shot logs from your Meticulous machine
shotHistory.noShotsDescription: No shots have been pulled with this profile yet
shotHistory.analysisDescription: AI-powered breakdown of your extraction against the profile targets
shotHistory.runAnalysisForOverlay: Run analysis to see graph overlay

shotComparison.title: Shot Comparison
shotComparison.noOtherShots: No other shots available to compare

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutDescription1: When I got my Meticulous, after a loooong wait, I was overwhelmed with the options — dialing in was no longer just adjusting grind size, the potential was (and is) basically limitless — my knowledge and time not so.
settings.aboutDescription2: This, "MeticAI", is a growing set of AI tools to enable me, and you, to get the most out of a Meticulous Espresso machine. Among other things it lets you automatically create espresso profiles tailored to your preferences and coffee at hand, understand your espresso profiles and shot data like never before, and ultimately — lets you unleash your Meticulous.
settings.apiKeyConfigured: API key is configured. Click the field to enter a new key.
settings.apiKeyConfiguredExtended: API key is configured. Click the field to enter a new key. You can keep the key saved and disable AI features below.
settings.aiAssistantDescription: Gemini API key is optional. Add one only if you want AI-powered profile and analysis features.
settings.enableAiFeaturesDescription: Turns AI tools on/off without removing your saved API key.
settings.hideAiWhenUnavailableDescription: When disabled, AI controls stay visible but disabled until AI is available.
settings.meticulousIpDescription: The IP address of your Meticulous espresso machine on your local network
settings.authorNameDescription: Your name for the author field in generated profile JSON. Defaults to "MeticAI" if left empty.
settings.mqttEnabledDescription: Real-time machine telemetry via MQTT. Powers the live Control Center dashboard.
settings.homeAssistantDescription: Connect Home Assistant to MeticAI's MQTT broker to auto-discover your Meticulous machine (24 sensors + 11 commands). Point HA to this server's IP on port 1883.

credits.pyMeticulous: Official Python client for the Meticulous API
credits.meticulousMcp: MCP server for profile management by @twchad
credits.meticulousAddon: MQTT bridge for real-time telemetry by @nickwilsonr

settings.updateAvailable: A new version of MeticAI is available!
settings.restartDescription: Restart all MeticAI services. Use this if you're experiencing issues.
settings.restartConfirm: Are you sure you want to restart MeticAI? The system will be unavailable for a few seconds.
settings.restartTriggered: Restart triggered! The system will restart momentarily.

tailscale.title: Remote Access
tailscale.authKeyExpired: Auth key expired — re-authenticate to restore remote access.
tailscale.enableDescription: Use Tailscale to securely access MeticAI from anywhere.
tailscale.authKeyPlaceholderExisting: Enter new key to replace existing
tailscale.authKeyDescription: A Tailscale auth key allows the sidecar to join your network.
tailscale.restartRequired: Saved. A restart is required for changes to take effect.
tailscale.setupStep1: Save a Tailscale auth key above and restart MeticAI.
tailscale.setupStep2: The Tailscale sidecar will join your tailnet automatically.
tailscale.setupStep3: Once connected, your remote URL will appear here.
tailscale.guideStep1: Install Tailscale on your phone or laptop from tailscale.com/download
tailscale.guideStep2: Sign in with the same account used during MeticAI setup
tailscale.guideStep3: Open this URL from any device on your Tailscale network:

updateMethod.watchtowerDescription: Updates are applied automatically when new versions are available.
updateMethod.manualDescription: No automatic update mechanism detected. Update manually via docker pull.

settings.footer: MeticAI • Built with ❤️ for coffee lovers

profileBreakdown.title: Profile Details
profileBreakdown.alsoVisible: Also visible in the Meticulous app under Profile Settings → Variables

validation.highPressure: ⚠ Stage {{stage}} sets pressure to {{value}} bar — typical max is 12 bar
validation.noEmojiPrefix: Adjustable variable "{{name}}" should not start with an emoji — it may not render in the Meticulous app
validation.lowWeight: ⚠ Target weight {{value}}g is unusually low — check your dose/yield

advanced.detailedKnowledgeDescription: Include full profiling guide and OEPF specification for higher quality profiles
advanced.detailedKnowledgeWarning: Warning: Detailed mode uses approximately 4× more input tokens (~40K vs ~10K). This significantly increases API costs and may exceed free-tier limits. Not recommended with free Gemini API keys.

qrCode.title: Open on Mobile
qrCode.description: Scan this QR code with your phone's camera to open this page on your mobile device
qrCode.pointCamera: 📱 Point your phone's camera at the QR code
qrCode.tapNotification: Tap the notification to open the link
qrCode.localhostWarning: This is a localhost URL. Configure a network IP in config.json (serverUrl) to enable cross-device access.

profileImport.title: Add Profile
profileImport.allProfilesImported: All machine profiles are already in your catalogue
profileImport.importingNote: Importing generates AI descriptions for each profile and will consume API tokens.
profileImport.generateAiDescriptionsHint: Adds richer profile summaries during import
profileImport.aiDescriptionsUnavailable: AI descriptions are unavailable. Enable AI features in Settings and ensure a Gemini API key is configured.
profileImport.generatingDescriptions: Generating AI descriptions for each profile...
profileImport.profileExists: Profile "{{name}}" already exists in your catalogue
profileImport.invalidJson: Invalid JSON file. Please select a valid profile JSON.
profileImport.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch profiles from machine

imageCrop.title: Crop Profile Image
imageCrop.description: Drag to position and use the slider to zoom. The image will be cropped to a square.

updateBanner.pleaseWait: Please wait while we update the system. This may take a few minutes. The page will automatically refresh when complete.
updateBanner.newVersionReady: A new version of MeticAI is ready to install

confirm.stopDesc: This will gracefully stop the current shot.
confirm.abortDesc: This will immediately abort the current shot. Use Stop for a graceful finish.
confirm.purgeDesc: This will run a purge cycle. Make sure there's a drip tray in place.

liveShot.title: Live Shot
liveShot.waitingDesc: The chart will appear once extraction begins.

pourWater.alert: Please pour water into the tank

expertAnalysis.title: AI Shot Analysis
expertAnalysis.disclaimer: This analysis is generated by AI and may not always be accurate. Use it as a starting point for your own experimentation.
expertAnalysis.analyzingDescription: Our AI barista is reviewing your extraction data and comparing it against the profile targets...

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.lightModeDescription: Switch between dark and light mode
appearance.followSystemDescription: Automatically match your system's dark/light mode preference

pourOver.title: Pour-over
pourOver.weighFromScaleTitle: Capture current scale weight as dose
pourOver.autoStartDescription: Starts when pour is detected, but ignores fast grounds-style spikes.
pourOver.bloomDescription: Shows a bloom countdown during the first seconds of brewing.
pourOver.offlineNotice: Machine is offline. Scale actions are disabled until connection is restored.

results.savedToHistory: Profile has been saved to your Meticulous device and history
